info.title: Mintlify Agent Score API
info.description: Public, unauthenticated endpoint for checking how agent-ready a documentation site is. Powers the free score tool at https://mintlify.com/score.

get.description: Returns the agent readiness score for a public documentation URL. The endpoint is unauthenticated and rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP address. The first request for a new URL queues a score computation and returns `202 Accepted` with a `Retry-After` header. Poll the endpoint until the response is `200 OK` with the computed score.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The public HTTPS URL of the documentation site to score. The host must be publicly resolvable. Maximum length is 2048 characters.

200.description: A score has been computed for the requested URL.

canonicalUrl.description: The canonical URL of the tracked site that Mintlify scored. This may differ from the requested URL if Mintlify resolved it to a different canonical form.

score.description: Overall agent readiness score between 0 and 100.

status.description: Indicates that a score is available in the response.

202.description: A score is being computed. Wait `retryAfterSeconds` seconds and request again. The same value is returned in the standard `Retry-After` HTTP header.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before polling again.

canonicalUrl.description: The canonical URL of the tracked site Mintlify is scoring.

retryAfterSeconds.description: Number of seconds to wait before polling again.

status.description: Indicates that a score computation is in progress.

400.description: The `url` query parameter is missing, malformed, or not a public HTTPS address.

value.error: url must be a public HTTPS address

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Each IP address may make up to 10 requests per minute.

502.description: Mintlify could not resolve or analyze the provided URL.

error.example: Failed to analyze the provided URL
